description: Whether rules can reference or include content from other files. Mechanisms vary: @-import syntax, @file.md directives, @path/to/file references.

amp.mechanism: No file import syntax documented for Amp rule files

claude-code.mechanism: @path/to/file syntax in CLAUDE.md files; relative and absolute paths; recursive up to 5 hops; requires per-project approval

cline.mechanism: No file import/include syntax documented for Cline rule files

codex.mechanism: No file import syntax documented for Codex AGENTS.md files

copilot-cli.mechanism: No @-import or file inclusion syntax documented for Copilot CLI rule files

crush.mechanism: No file import directive documented for AGENTS.md in Crush

cursor.mechanism: MDC rule bodies may reference other files via @path syntax that inlines the referenced file into the rule context.

factory-droid.mechanism: No file import syntax documented for Factory Droid rule files

gemini-cli.mechanism: file_imports extension: Gemini CLI supports including external file content into rule files via import directives

kiro.mechanism: kiro_steering_file_references: Kiro steering files can reference other files using @file syntax

opencode.mechanism: No documented import directive for rule files

pi.mechanism: No file import syntax documented for Pi rule files

roo-code.mechanism: No import directive syntax documented — rule files are loaded as plain markdown bodies

windsurf.mechanism: No @-import or file inclusion syntax documented for Windsurf rule files

zed.mechanism: no import directive documented for Zed's .rules file
